item.body:
## What's Changed
### AI Chat - **AI Chat** — The built-in Siemens reference guides are now available to every agent automatically — no setup needed, and updates add new guides by themselves. - **AI Chat** — Simpler knowledge settings: one shared list for your own reference files, plus per-agent tick boxes for the built-in guides. - **AI Chat** — Fixed repeated "Context compacted" messages flooding the conversation in long sessions. - **AI Chat** — AI code edits in the editor, unit test suites, and files now apply more reliably.
